title: Terminal SDK migration guide
excerpt: Learn how to migrate to version 5.0.0 of the Stripe Terminal SDK. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [iOS](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/references/sdk-migration-guide.md?terminal-sdk-platform=ios) - [Android](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/references/sdk-migration-guide.md?terminal-sdk-platform=android)
